name: Borreload Furious Dragon
name_jp: ヴァレルロード・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フュリアス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・ドラゴン
desc:
2 DARK Dragon monsters
(Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster you control and 1 card your opponent controls; destroy them. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 DARK Link Monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but neither player can activate its effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Borreload Furious Dragon" once per turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
